description: Fetch X (Twitter) trending topics from the Explore page. Supports trending/for-you/news/sports/entertainment tabs and client-side filtering by domain_context (e.g., United States, worldwide). Returns rank, name, domain context, and search URL. Requires a logged-in X.com session in the browser.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Filter by domain_context substring, e.g. 'United States' or 'worldwide'. Returns all trends if omitted.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of trends to return
